name: Timeline
description: Timeline visualizes a series of chained events.

props.name: value
props.description: An array of events to display.

props.name: align
props.description: Position of the timeline bar relative to the content.

props.name: dataKey
props.description: Name of the field that uniquely identifies the a record in the data.

props.name: unstyled
props.description: When enabled, it removes component related styles in the core.

slots.type: (scope: { /** * Item data */ item: any; /** * Index of item */ index: number; }): VNode[]
